title: Forecasting Food Prices in Algeria: A Macro-Micro Analytical Approach
about: Combines monthly local market price data for staple commodities (2015–2025) with national macroeconomic indicators (2014–2023) to diagnose drivers of food inflation in Algeria. The project aligns commodity-level time series with annual indicators (food production index, exchange rates, imports/exports) and applies exploratory analysis, econometric modeling and forecasting to provide policy-relevant insights and early-warning signals for price spikes.

images.alt: Imports and exports vs local prices
Exchange rate vs food price index

title: Algerian Real Estate Market Analytics
about: This project delivers actionable insights into the Algerian real estate market through a combination of data analysis and visualization. By examining scraped listings from OuedKniss, it highlights supply concentration, pricing competitiveness, and regional coverage gaps across Wilayas. The findings are presented in interactive Tableau dashboards, enabling stakeholders to better understand market dynamics and make informed, data-driven marketing and investment decisions.

title: Open Source CRM
about: An open-source CRM built with Next.js and Supabase, with multi-tenant auth, permissioned lead tables, pipeline and follow-up views, imports and exports, analytics, admin tooling, and RLS-backed access control. You can clone it and use it for your team.

title: Zaki Mode
about: A modern minimal clothing shop for a client, with product and stock management, promotions, accounting, analytics, and featured products on the home page.

title: Study Sphere
about: A secure platform where educators share course materials, quizzes, and AI‑powered support, and students track progress and engage in real time.

title: Restaurant POS
about: This Point‑of‑Sale project is a desktop application designed for both takeaway and table service: in a single click it prints customer receipts, kitchen and table tickets, plus fully customizable slips like a “Pizzario” ticket; it logs every sale so you can review your entire history at any time, includes a built‑in accounting module to track revenue and costs, and lets you configure one or two printers in the settings for front‑ and back‑of‑house workflows—all wrapped in a clean, modern UI optimized for lightning‑fast order entry and printing.
